title: Nilave Mugam Kaattu
subTitle: Prakash and Murthy forge an unlikely friendship after a tragic accident involving their parents. Their bond is tested when they unknowingly fall for the same girl, challenging their loyalty.

title: Vadakku Vaasal
subTitle: Murali is an easy-going boy who falls in love with Priya from his college. Since her family is against their union, it creates problems for the lovers.

title: Shondham 16
subTitle: Varadhan falls for Sundari, but her father demands he must have a large family to marry her. Subsequently, Varadhan embarks on a comedic journey to find relatives in order to wed her.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Chinna Thambi Periya Thambi
subTitle: Periya Thambi and Chinna Thambi are two brothers from a poor family who fall in love with the same girl, Kavitha. However, her parents reject them due to their background.

title: Simla Special
subTitle: Two friends, Gopu and Babu, own a troupe that performs comedic plays. When Babu faces a financial crisis, the two friends decide to accept a commission and perform for the Tamilians in Shimla.

title: Mouna Raagam
subTitle: Divya is a lively young girl, who secretly mourns the death of her lover. She reluctantly agrees to an arranged marriage with Chandrakumar and faces difficulties.

title: Vaaimaiye Vellum
subTitle: Raja is hired by a journalist, who is investigating the kidnapping of rich children, to protect his daughter. In turn, Raja earns the enmity of the criminals behind the operation.

title: Petta
subTitle: In a bid to save his best friend's son Anwar, hostel warden Kaali goes against local goons. However, everything goes haywire when he is forced to face his past.

title: Vaanmathi
subTitle: Krishna, a young man, comes from a middle-class family but falls in love with a rich girl. Things take a turn when the girl's father opposes their union.

title: Vaanmathi
subTitle: Krishna, a young man, comes from a middle-class family but falls in love with a rich girl. Things take a turn when the girl's father opposes their union.

title: Thoongatha Kannendru Ondru
subTitle: Devi secretly weds Ravi, who later leaves for a career in films. Chaos unfolds when Devi's father decides to arrange her marriage with another man.

title: Manju Virattu
subTitle: Pandi and Poovazhagi hate each other since childhood. Their families forcefully get them married against their wish, much to their dismay, to end the trouble between the families.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Anjali
subTitle: Chitra who thought her child is dead, learns that she is still alive and dealing with a cognitive disorder. However, her family is facing several challenges while raising her.

title: Oorai Therinjukitten
subTitle: Pandiyan, who lost his mother at a young age, becomes a conman to educate his sister. However, his life turns upside down when he is unable to settle the dowry for his sister's marriage.

title: Manithanin Marupakkam
subTitle: Sujatha, a journalist, covers the story of Ravi who has been sentenced for murdering his wife Kala, Sujatha's sister. However, a day before his scheduled execution, Ravi escapes the prison.

title: Rishi
subTitle: Rishi, a thief, happens to own a floppy disk incriminating a minister of murder. Things turn chaotic when his lookalike Velu is targeted by the minister for the footage.

title: Aanandham
subTitle: As the eldest son, Thirupathisamy shoulders the responsibility of supporting his three younger brothers. However, tensions rise when his brother's wife challenges his authority.

title: Sattam
subTitle: Raja and Ravi, two best friends, fall in love with the same girl, Radha. But, trouble ensues when Ravi expects a sacrifice from her, in order to save his best friend.

title: Sattam
subTitle: Raja and Ravi, two best friends, fall in love with the same girl, Radha. But, trouble ensues when Ravi expects a sacrifice from her, in order to save his best friend.

title: Aagaya Pookkal
subTitle: Upon discovering the shocking truth about his friend Manikyam's death, Siva resolves to seek revenge as justice for his friend.

title: Mary Albert
subTitle: Owing to a Christian priest, a thug undergoes an extreme transformation. However, things get difficult when his past comes back to haunt him.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Captain
subTitle: Kannayiram, a powerful gangster, kills Ramasamy, for not giving up his land to him. After hearing this news, Shiva, Ramasamy's brother, flees the military camp to avenge his brother's death.

title: Unakkaga Oru Roja
subTitle: Kannan, a poor man, is in relationship with his colleague Meera. However, he abandons her when he gets a marriage proposal from a rich woman.

title: Enna Petha Raasa
subTitle: Lakshmi and Raja fall in love and decide to get married. But on the day of the marriage, Raja is accused of murdering a woman.

title: Thirunelveli
subTitle: Thulasi, a highly respected man in the village, is known for his truthfulness in all circumstances. But the real testing time arrives when his good trait brings a lot of trouble to the family.

title: Vetri Kodi Kattu
subTitle: Sekhar and Muthuraman are tricked by a con man who promises them visas to fly to Dubai. In order to protect their families from any harm, they decide to swap addresses.

title: Nalla Thambi
subTitle: Raju, unwilling to marry a girl chosen by his father, escapes from home with his mother's help. Later, he rescues Chitra from her controlling relatives and they fall in love.
